prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock PRV (Peugeot-Renault-Volvo) Z7U-702 (2.5L V6 Turbo, 250 PS) with a fully built internals package including forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JP3 Performance to handle 1.2 bar boost reliably. Pair with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (76mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by Milltek Sport with 200-cell catalytic converters for Euro 6 compliance.

Fuel & Ignition: Upgrade to a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with a custom 4D ignition map optimized for 102-octane fuel, paired with a set of Bosch Motorsport 0280158861 850cc/min injectors. Add a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can system to manage crankcase pressure under high boost.

Suspension & Chassis: Install a full Öhlins TTX40 coilover kit with 24-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the A610’s rear-engine layout, and spherical bearing top mounts. Reinforce the chassis with a GTSport Engineering carbon fiber front strut brace and a rear subframe brace made from 4130 chromoly. Fit AP Racing CP8394-4000 380mm front brake rotors with CP8396-100 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom brake bias valve for optimal rear-engine weight distribution.
estetica: Aero: Install a full Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit for the A610, including carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom ducktail spoiler with a Gurney flap. Add a custom front splitter by Rocket Bunny with integrated canards and a rear diffuser by Vorsteiner to improve downforce at high speeds.

Wheels & Tires: Fit a set of BBS LM-R wheels (18x10 +20 front, 18x12 +30 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear). Use custom wheel spacers by H&R to achieve a flush fitment while maintaining proper scrub radius.

Interior & Exterior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 6-point). Add a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Varis and a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada. For exterior accents, apply a full 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the mirrors, roof, and rear spoiler.
